title: Subitem Item Name Missing on Slack Integration
excerpt: I am creating a custom integration – when a subitem status changes, a message will be sent to a slack channel.  The issue I am running into is that the sub item name is not an option to put in the message, only the item.…

posts.author: iwiretech (Brienne Martin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am creating a custom integration – when a subitem status changes, a message will be sent to a slack channel. The issue I am running into is that the sub item name is not an option to put in the message, only the item. So, when the message goes out, it is only referencing the item and not the specific subitem.

Help??

posts.author: hnoshita (hnoshita)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello developer team,

Could you please make a request to the developer for the implementation of this feature.
